waiver.reason_summary: The gate runner images or their registry path could not be pulled even though the surrounding gate contract was otherwise healthy.
waiver.detail: registry.lv3.org/check-runner/python:3.12.10 not found caused semgrep-sast, service-completeness, type-check, workstream-surfaces failures. yaml-lint passed. Changes are workstream YAML carry-forward from epic-liskov and duplicate YAML key fixes.
